concerns: Step 3 states 'particleWarp.frag, pointWarp.frag — same file' but they are separate files that need independent edits
Terrain gl_PointSize max jump from 6.0 to 20.0 (3.3x) risks heavy overdraw with 120k dense particles — consider a more conservative max (~12.0)
Step 6 omits adding dofStrength to the QualityProfile interface and updating extractSystemConfig() in quality.ts — both are required for the quality-tier pattern
crystalWarp shader pair not deeply verified — plan assumes it follows the same uniform/alpha pattern as the other 6 shaders
